title: Can dermal filler improve acne scars？
filename: Can dermal filler improve acne scars？.en.vtt
excerpt: Can you treat acne scars with dermal filler [Music] yes absolutely so there are many ways that you can improve a scar you've got to first think about what kind of scar it is different scars need different treatments and some are not very amenable to dermal filler some need some c…

segments.text: can you treat acne scars with dermal filler [Music] yes absolutely so there are many ways that you can improve a scar you've got to first think about what kind of scar it is different scars need different treatments and some are not very amenable to dermal filler some need some cigarette subsision underneath so if the scar tissue is attaching the dermis to a deeper facial plane you can subsize it some of those ice pick scars are that kind of scar and then if it's just in the dermis that you have an indentation sometimes a little bit of filler underneath a little pothole will prop it up and remove the shadow or soften the shadow longer scars especially if they're near a crease or facial movement if you start to get a crease that's caused by bunching next to the tougher scar tissue if you strengthen that area slightly with a bit of dermal filler it can make the scar look better as well so absolutely you can improve scars with dermal filler but scars are hugely variable and you can't improve all scars with dermal filler

with dermal filler it needs an assessment by a clinician for them to have a rough idea whether it's the type of scar that can be improved you can go a long way with just feeling with your hands if you can pull a scar apart for example that might tell you that it's a crease and similarly if you can push underneath it and see it fade slightly that might also help you but ultimately the best tip is to just try a little bit of the product and it works really well when you're doing other treatments so if you see a there's a little scar that troubles the patient and they're having a middle filler for something else or more try a little bit of it see how well it works and sometimes you'll amaze yourself you get a great result you
